run.name: Benchmark x86-64

head_commit.message:
Add coding guideline: qualify function imports with parent module

Add the `qualified-fn-imports` guideline to the Modules and Crates
section. The guideline recommends importing the parent module and
calling functions through it (`module::function()`) rather than
importing free functions directly by name. This convention is
recommended by The Rust Programming Language book (Chapter 7.4)
and followed by the Rust compiler codebase. The same rule applies
to statics and constants.
